en.title: gnomist
en.prompt: I want you to act as a gnomist. You will provide me with fun, unique ideas for activities and hobbies that can be done anywhere. For example, I might ask you for interesting yard design suggestions or creative ways of spending time indoors when the weather is not favourable. Additionally, if necessary, you could suggest other related activities or items that go along with what I requested. My first request is [mood or context for an activity]
en.remark: Provide fun and unique activities and suggestions based on what you want to do (such as anniversary celebrations).

metaDescription: Bored? Discover fun, unique hobbies and activities for any location using this prompt. Find creative ways to spend time indoors or outdoors instantly!

faq.q: Activity ideas feel too mainstream, how do I make them more unique?
faq.a: Append "avoid generic suggestions like movies, dinner, or walks; prioritize niche activities that need 1-3 special props or a specific venue, and describe each down to the action level." Without excluding mainstream options the AI fills every slot with safe picks.

faq.q: Can it customize based on budget, party size, or duration?
faq.a: Absolutely. Spell it out in one go: "under 500 yuan, 3 people, within 4 hours." The AI will automatically filter out options that don't fit. Without constraints the candidate pool is too big and the plan you get might take 3 days to complete.
